summary: Completed testing of Referral + Sales Commission Governance Pack and Payment Confirmation + Affiliate Promo Pack. Backend: 27/27 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows verified including Admin Affiliate Manager, Service Leads, Finance Queue, and Orders pages.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test affiliates via API during testing (TEST*, UITEST*, DASH*, TRACK*, LEAD*, COMM*, PROMO*, DUP* prefixed codes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral + Sales Commission Governance Pack and Payment Confirmation + Affiliate Promo Pack fully tested. Commission rules CRUD working (5% affiliate, 3% sales default). Affiliate CRUD with duplicate code rejection (409). Referral tracking for click/lead events. Commission trigger creates commissions from commissionable_base_amount (not margin). Affiliate promo benefit editor saves/retrieves benefit text. Payment submission creates proof and moves to under_review. Approve-payment-and-distribute validates admin/finance roles (403 for others). Admin sidebar has 'Affiliates' link at /admin/affiliate-manager. AdminAffiliateManagerSimple shows table with Name, Code, Status, Clicks, Leads, Sales, Unpaid Commission columns. Create affiliate form works with data-testid attributes. Service Leads shows promotional material customization and service requests. Finance Queue shows 25 payment proofs. Orders shows 63 orders with split view.

backend: GET /api/referral-commission/rules - Returns default commission rules (5% affiliate, 3% sales) ✓
POST /api/referral-commission/affiliate/create - Creates affiliate with promo code ✓
GET /api/referral-commission/admin/affiliates - Returns list of affiliates with stats ✓
POST /api/referral-commission/track - Returns 404 for invalid promo code ✓
POST /api/referral-commission/track - Returns 400 for missing promo code ✓
POST /api/referral-commission/trigger-after-payment-approval - Creates commissions from commissionable base ✓
GET /api/admin-flow-fixes/finance/queue - Returns array of payment proofs ✓
frontend: Admin dashboard loads at /admin with Affiliates count (6) ✓
Admin sidebar has 'Affiliates' link under OPERATIONS section ✓
Affiliates table displays with columns: Name, Code, Status, Clicks, Leads, Sales, Unpaid Commission ✓
Create Affiliate form appears with all inputs (name, code, email, phone) ✓
Create Affiliate form has proper data-testid attributes ✓
Affiliate creation via form works (UITEST1246 created) ✓
Service Leads page at /admin/service-leads loads with leads table ✓
Finance Queue page at /admin/finance-queue loads with 25 payment proofs ✓
Orders page at /admin/orders loads with 63 orders in split view ✓

commission_calculation_verified.note: Commission is created from commissionable_base_amount (total_amount), NOT by reducing margin
